title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
